description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tbd-sim-tapp-osx that runs on every push to master and aem branches and on pull requests to those branches. Use a single macos-latest job that installs boost with Homebrew, checks out the repository and submodules, builds and packages tapp and simulator projects with CMake, and archives the binaries. Then create a draft pre-release with a generated tag and upload the archived binaries as a release asset.
